name: MANKA
description: Transaction landing service for Solana. Instead of a public RPC, you send to the MANKA gateway, which delivers the transaction to the leader validator over staked connections (SWQoS) for higher speed and inclusion probability, with built-in front-running / sandwich protection. Two transports are planned: HTTP (live) and gRPC (in development).

api_key.note: Every request needs a key. Each key comes with individual terms: a TPS limit and a per-transaction minimum tip.
api_key.how_to_get: Request a key from support via the #request channel on the official Discord (https://discord.gg/ZPjeV7WRyR).

key_terms.tps_limit: How many transactions per second the key may send (enforced, see error -32098).
key_terms.minimum_tip: The minimum service fee per transaction assigned to the key (enforced, see error -32000 'Min tip is X SOL').

api_key.trial: First-week promo of 0.0001 SOL tip advertised on the docs; request via a Discord ticket.

tip_wallet_note: Rotate randomly between addresses to avoid write-lock contention under load. The tip destination MUST be in the transaction's static account keys, not referenced via an Address Lookup Table (otherwise error -32001 'At least 1 tip address required').
tip_note: There is no single global minimum: the minimum tip is set per API key. The attached amount also acts as a priority signal — a larger tip improves queue position during congested slots. Docs advertise a first-week 0.0001 SOL trial; the quickstart example uses 1000000 lamports (0.001 SOL) purely as an illustration.
cost_on_failure: No cost — MANKA charges its fee on-chain and only for a successfully landed transaction. The tip is a plain SOL transfer to a tip account and only settles if the transaction lands.

mainnet.note: Same API on every host; only the hostname changes and any key works in every region. Pick the region closest to your infrastructure (measure with ping or curl -w "%{time_total}"). The regions/HTTP-API pages document http:// hosts; the quickstart curl example uses https://fra.manka.wtf:5000/send — confirm the scheme with support when onboarding.

transports.http: Live. JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP, api-key passed as query parameter.
transports.grpc: Announced but not yet available ('still working on this' — watch the Discord for the release).

encoding.note: Transactions (and every element of a bundle) must be base64-encoded serialized signed transactions, legacy or v0. base58 is not accepted (error -32602 'Invalid base64').

sendTransaction.description: Submit a single signed transaction. No preflight simulation is performed — it goes straight to submission for maximum speed.

params.description: Signed transaction serialized and base64-encoded. Must include a tip transfer and a recent blockhash.
Config object accepted for compatibility with standard Solana RPC. Preflight is skipped regardless.

sendTransaction.returns: Transaction signature (string) in the result field.

sendBundle.description: Submit an atomic bundle of 1 to 4 transactions: either all land in the block or none do. Suited to arbitrage, multi-step swaps and similar flows.

params.description: Array of 1-4 base64-encoded signed transactions. No duplicate transactions. At least one transaction must pay a tip; the total tip across the bundle must be >= the key's minimum tip.

sendBundle.returns: Bundle ID (string) in the result field.

getHealth.description: Health/ping method (referenced by the errors page as a valid method alongside sendTransaction and sendBundle).

features.swqos: Delivery to the leader validator over priority staked connections (Stake-Weighted QoS) for higher speed and inclusion probability.

mev_protection.name: mankaProtect
mev_protection.description: Front-running / sandwich protection enabled by adding a single special address to the transaction's account list. The gateway auto-detects it and runs the transaction in protected mode. Optional — if absent, the transaction takes the regular fast path.

features.skip_preflight: No preflight simulation is ever run; transactions are submitted directly.

rate_limits.model: Per-API-key TPS limit set individually per key.
rate_limits.exceeded_response: JSON-RPC error -32098 'Rate limit exceeded. Limit: N per second' (HTTP 200).
rate_limits.increase: Ask support (Discord) to raise the limit.
rate_limits.guidance: Slow down and add exponential backoff when rate limited.

constraints.tip_location: Tip transfer must be in static account keys, not an Address Lookup Table
constraints.signature: Transaction must be signed before sending (error -32000 'No signature in transaction').

error_codes.transport: All gateway errors are returned as JSON-RPC 2.0 error objects with HTTP status 200. The only exception: a body that is not valid JSON returns HTTP 400 with plain text 'invalid JSON'.

messages.API key required: The api-key query parameter is missing from the URL.
No transfer to a MANKA tip account among the static account keys (ALT reference does not count).

messages.Min tip is X SOL: Attached tip below the key's minimum. Permanent until you raise the tip.
messages.Transaction send failed: Gateway could not deliver. Transient — retry with a fresh blockhash.
messages.Bundle submission failed:: Bundle rejected downstream; read details, rebuild and retry.

messages.Invalid base64: Transaction string could not be decoded — use base64, not base58.
messages.Invalid tx format: Bytes do not deserialize into a Solana transaction (legacy or v0).
messages.No transactions provided / Invalid param: sendBundle called without a transaction array.
messages.Each transaction must be a base64 string: Non-string element in the bundle array.
messages.Bundle must include a tip to a MANKA tip: Add the tip transfer to any one transaction in the bundle.

messages.Rate limit exceeded. Limit: N per second: Key exceeded its TPS allowance. Transient — back off and retry.

best_practices: Include a SOL tip transfer to a MANKA tip account in every transaction; without it the request is rejected (-32001).
Keep the tip account in the transaction's static account keys, never behind an Address Lookup Table.
Rotate tip accounts at random to reduce write-lock contention under load.
Encode transactions as base64 (legacy or v0); base58 is rejected.
Raise the tip during congestion — the amount doubles as your priority signal.
Add the mankadontfront address for front-running protection when needed.
Retry -32098 and 'Transaction send failed' with exponential backoff and a fresh blockhash; do not blindly retry permanent errors.
Pick the region closest to your servers; measure round-trip time to fra/ams/nyc first.
notes: API keys, terms and support are handled through Discord; there is no self-serve dashboard documented yet.
gRPC transport is announced but not yet live as of this record.
Official channels: website https://manka.wtf/, X https://x.com/mankalandingwtf, Discord https://discord.gg/ZPjeV7WRyR, Telegram @MankaLanding. MANKA staff never DM first or ask for keys/seed phrases.
